# backend/routers/dbviewer.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-02T10:00:38Z

## Purpose
§68.1 + §68.2 — HOLY DB Viewer + per-function table catalog.

Read-only API over registered databases. Composes with global §68 (HOLY
Observability + Data Hub Standard) + the existing TenantId + RBAC +
holy_audit federation (§64.43 #7) + PII redaction (§47.6).

Endpoints (8 total):
  §68.1 DB Viewer:
    GET /api/v1/holy/dbviewer/_global
    GET /api/v1/holy/dbviewer/databases/{db_id}
    GET /api/v1/holy/dbviewer/databases/{db_id}/schemas/{schema}
    GET /api/v1/holy/dbviewer/databases/{db_id}/schemas/{schema}/tables/{table}
    GET /api/v1/holy/dbviewer/databases/{db_id}/schemas/{schema}/tables/{table}/sample

  §68.2 Per-function tables:
    GET /api/v1/holy/dbviewer/process-tables/_global
    GET /api/v1/holy/dbviewer/process-tables/{dept}
    GET /api/v1/holy/dbviewer/process-tables/{dept}/{process_id}

All validators (db_id / schema / table / process_id format checks) run
BEFORE log_holy_access per §47.6 anti-info-leak.

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `_` import re
- from `_` import time
- from `typing` import Any
- from `fastapi` import APIRouter, HTTPException, Query, Request
- from `core.holy_audit` import log_holy_access
- from `core.middleware` import current_tenant_id
- from `services` import dbviewer_service

## Inputs
(no CLI / env inputs — library module or implicit)

## Process
### Functions
- `_validate_db_id(db_id)`: (no docstring)
- `_validate_ident(label, value)`: (no docstring)
- `_validate_dept(dept)`: (no docstring)
- `global_overview(http_request)`: Cross-database overview — registered DBs + counts.
- `database_info(http_request, db_id)`: Return registered DB info + list of schemas.
- `schema_tables(http_request, db_id, schema)`: List tables in a schema with PII + tenant_id flags + row estimates.
- `table_detail(http_request, db_id, schema, table)`: Column list + PK + FK + PII flags for a single table.
- `table_sample(http_request, db_id, schema, table, limit)`: Sample rows (PII-redacted by default, tenant-scoped at SQL).
- `process_tables_global(http_request)`: Whole per-process table catalog (§68.2).
- `process_tables_dept(http_request, dept)`: Per-dept process table catalog.
- `process_tables_detail(http_request, dept, process_id)`: Single process — primary + secondary tables + join keys + PII columns.

## Outputs
- Return values from functions above

## Notable inline comments
- 19 HOLY departments — single source of truth for cross-dept validation.
- Identifier regex shared with the service module.
- --- §68.1 DB Viewer surface --------------------------------------------
- IMPORTANT — _global BEFORE the parameterized paths per §66.3 FastAPI
- greedy-match trap.
